title: cestrum mancoi
intro: Cestrum mancoi, also known as the Yellow Jessamine or Yellow Trumpet Vine, is a flowering plant native to the Andes mountains in South America. It is a woody vine with a history of traditional use in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties. The medicinal properties of Cestrum mancoi have been used to alleviate various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, due to its ability to relax muscles and calm the nervous system. Cestrum mancoi is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
